creator: olivierw1+bugzilla-freebsd@hotmail.com
text:
Hello,

Oh! I'm very sorry, it's my mistake.
Yes, when I had the error I installed squid from the official repo (latest), but it was installed in a FreeBSD built with nanobsd... and I forgot I had disabled Kerberos and other stuff.

Sorry for this useless bug report. And thanks for your help!

Best Regards
